name: Number C106: Giant Red Hand

name_jp_rom: Kaosu Nanbāzu Hyakuroku Yōganshō Jaianto Hando Reddo
name_jp_tl: Chaos Numbers 106: Lava Palm - Giant Hand Red
desc:
3 Level 5 monsters
If this card has a "Number" monster as material, it gains this effect.
● Once per turn, when a card or effect is activated on the field (Quick Effect): Detach 1 material from this card, and if you do, negate the effects of all other face-up cards currently on the field until the end of this turn.
